title: Tender British Lamb Roast
description: A garlicky and tender lamb roast with a hint of sweetness, featuring powdered sugar in a light British dish. This Whole30-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, powdered sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the garlic-sugar mixture all over the lamb leg, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb leg until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the lamb for 20 minutes per kilogram, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 63°C.
Baste the lamb with lemon juice and sprinkle with chopped rosemary after 30 minutes of roasting.
Continue roasting until the lamb is tender and cooked to your liking.
Let the lamb rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
